languages.original_text: {n}After listening to the servo-skull, Eogunn puffs out his cheeks in displeasure.{/n} "Nuncius, what an appalling thing to say! Our partnership is perfectly equal! Keep your mischief-making to yourself and don't mislead the Rogue Trader!"

languages.text: {n}Прислушавшись к серочерепу, Эоганн недовольно надувает щеки.{/n} "Нунциус, это возмутительно! Наше партнерство совершенно равнозначно, держи свое смутьянство при себе и не путай Вольного Торговца!"

{n}After listening to the servo-skull, Eogunn puffs out his cheeks in displeasure.{/n} "Nuncius, what an appalling thing to say! Our partnership is perfectly equal! Keep your mischief-making to yourself and don't mislead the Rogue Trader!"
languages.original_text: {n}Прислушавшись к серочерепу, Эоганн недовольно надувает щеки.{/n} "Нунциус, это возмутительно! Наше партнерство совершенно равнозначно, держи свое смутьянство при себе и не путай Вольного Торговца!"

traits.locale_text: {n}After listening to the servo-skull, Eogunn puffs out his cheeks in displeasure.{/n} "Nuncius, what an appalling thing to say! Our partnership is perfectly equal! Keep your mischief-making to yourself and don't mislead the Rogue Trader!"

{n}After listening to the servo-skull, Eogunn puffs out his cheeks in displeasure.{/n} "Nuncius, what an appalling thing to say! Our partnership is perfectly equal! Keep your mischief-making to yourself and don't mislead the Rogue Trader!"

{n}After listening to the servo-skull, Eogunn puffs out his cheeks in displeasure.{/n} "Nuncius, what an appalling thing to say! Our partnership is perfectly equal! Keep your mischief-making to yourself and don't mislead the Rogue Trader!"

languages.text: {n}Tras escuchar al servocráneo, Eogunn hincha los carrillos con desagrado.{/n} «¡Nuncius, qué comentario tan terrible! ¡Nuestra relación está perfectamente equilibrada! ¡Guárdese las travesuras para sus adentros y no líe a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente!».
languages.original_text: {n}After listening to the servo-skull, Eogunn puffs out his cheeks in displeasure.{/n} "Nuncius, what an appalling thing to say! Our partnership is perfectly equal! Keep your mischief-making to yourself and don't mislead the Rogue Trader!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Tras escuchar al servocráneo, Eogunn hincha los carrillos con desagrado.{/n} «¡Nuncius, qué comentario tan terrible! ¡Nuestra relación está perfectamente equilibrada! ¡Guárdese las travesuras para sus adentros y no líe a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente!».

languages.text: {n}听完伺服头骨的话，伊奥贡鼓起脸，一脸不悦。{/n}“努恩修斯，这话也太过分了！我们的合作是完全平等的！少在这儿添油加醋，也别误导行商浪人！”
languages.original_text: {n}After listening to the servo-skull, Eogunn puffs out his cheeks in displeasure.{/n} "Nuncius, what an appalling thing to say! Our partnership is perfectly equal! Keep your mischief-making to yourself and don't mislead the Rogue Trader!"

traits.locale_text: {n}听完伺服头骨的话，伊奥贡鼓起脸，一脸不悦。{/n}“努恩修斯，这话也太过分了！我们的合作是完全平等的！少在这儿添油加醋，也别误导行商浪人！”

languages.text: {n}Après avoir écouté le servocrâne, Eogunn gonfle les joues en signe de mécontentement.{/n} « Mais enfin, Nuncius, ne dis pas une chose pareille ! Notre partenariat est parfaitement égal ! Garde tes bêtises pour toi, ne va pas raconter n'importe quoi {mf|au libre-marchand|à la libre-marchande} ! »
languages.original_text: {n}After listening to the servo-skull, Eogunn puffs out his cheeks in displeasure.{/n} "Nuncius, what an appalling thing to say! Our partnership is perfectly equal! Keep your mischief-making to yourself and don't mislead the Rogue Trader!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Après avoir écouté le servocrâne, Eogunn gonfle les joues en signe de mécontentement.{/n} « Mais enfin, Nuncius, ne dis pas une chose pareille ! Notre partenariat est parfaitement égal ! Garde tes bêtises pour toi, ne va pas raconter n'importe quoi {mf|au libre-marchand|à la libre-marchande} ! »

languages.text: {n}Nachdem er dem Servoschädel zugehört hat, bläst Eogunn missmutig seine Wangen auf.{/n} "Nuncius, wie könnt Ihr so etwas sagen? Unsere Partnerschaft ist absolut gleichberechtigt. Behaltet Eure Späße für Euch und führt {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} nicht in die Irre."
languages.original_text: {n}After listening to the servo-skull, Eogunn puffs out his cheeks in displeasure.{/n} "Nuncius, what an appalling thing to say! Our partnership is perfectly equal! Keep your mischief-making to yourself and don't mislead the Rogue Trader!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Nachdem er dem Servoschädel zugehört hat, bläst Eogunn missmutig seine Wangen auf.{/n} "Nuncius, wie könnt Ihr so etwas sagen? Unsere Partnerschaft ist absolut gleichberechtigt. Behaltet Eure Späße für Euch und führt {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} nicht in die Irre."

languages.text: {n}サーヴォスカルの話を聞き終えたエオガンは、不愉快そうに頬を膨らませた。{/n}「ヌンキウス、なんてひどいことを言うんだ！我々のパートナーシップは完全に対等だ！ローグ・トレーダーを惑わすような真似はするな！」
languages.original_text: {n}After listening to the servo-skull, Eogunn puffs out his cheeks in displeasure.{/n} "Nuncius, what an appalling thing to say! Our partnership is perfectly equal! Keep your mischief-making to yourself and don't mislead the Rogue Trader!"

traits.locale_text: {n}サーヴォスカルの話を聞き終えたエオガンは、不愉快そうに頬を膨らませた。{/n}「ヌンキウス、なんてひどいことを言うんだ！我々のパートナーシップは完全に対等だ！ローグ・トレーダーを惑わすような真似はするな！」

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, hizmeleti dinledikten sonra hoşnutsuzlukla yanaklarını şişiriyor.{/n} "Nuncius, ne korkunç şeyler diyorsun öyle! Ortaklığımız tamamen eşit! Fesatlığını kendine sakla, Hür Tacir'i yanıltma!"
languages.original_text: {n}After listening to the servo-skull, Eogunn puffs out his cheeks in displeasure.{/n} "Nuncius, what an appalling thing to say! Our partnership is perfectly equal! Keep your mischief-making to yourself and don't mislead the Rogue Trader!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn, hizmeleti dinledikten sonra hoşnutsuzlukla yanaklarını şişiriyor.{/n} "Nuncius, ne korkunç şeyler diyorsun öyle! Ortaklığımız tamamen eşit! Fesatlığını kendine sakla, Hür Tacir'i yanıltma!"
